name: vaybel
description: Vaybel skills: code-on-MCP workflows for turning apparel ideas into designs and flat mockups.

interface.longDescription: Vaybel Skills let Codex turn an apparel idea into a Vaybel design and flat mockups by executing TypeScript orchestration code against the public Vaybel MCP server.
